name: Ceregi
recipeIngredient: enough flour to make soft dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks until light in color.
2. Gradually add vinegar, then whiskey, and continue adding flour until the mixture forms a soft dough.
3. Roll out the dough very thin on a floured surface.
4. Cut into triangles and carefully make a slit in the center of each triangle.
5. Pull one end of the triangle through the slit to create a C shape.
6. Deep fry the Ceregi in Crisco until they are delicately browned.
7. Remove from oil, drain on paper towels, and sprinkle with powdered sugar.
This recipe should yield a nice platterful of Ceregi.
